text.title: Gemini Multimodal Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship a Gemini multimodal pipeline.

step.name: classify-input
step.action: Detect mime + size. Branch: ≤4MB image total → inline; everything else → Files API path.
step.decision-gate: If unclear mime, run probe (e.g. ffprobe) before continuing.

step.name: upload
step.action: Upload via Files API; capture file_id + upload_ts.
step.decision-gate: On quota error → backoff and retry once.

step.name: poll-active
step.action: Loop client.files.get(file_id) until state == ACTIVE; FAILED → re-upload; cap iterations.

step.name: cache-if-repeat
step.action: If reuse ≥3 AND tokens ≥32K, create context cache; reuse cache_id on subsequent calls.
step.output: cache_id stored; metrics for hit rate.
step.decision-gate: If cache hit rate <30%, evaluate whether to disable caching here.

step.name: generate
step.action: Send generate_content with parts referencing the file (or cache). Apply standard safety + finish_reason handling.
step.decision-gate: Surface BLOCK_REASON; do not coerce to empty.

step.name: ttl-and-monitor
step.action: Watch upload-age; re-upload near 48h. Dashboard tile shows upload/cache success rates + cost.
step.decision-gate: Alert when re-upload rate > 10%/day (probably misuse pattern).
